note: Stage 4 RPG 場景：四向動作 sheet + 多格建築/樹木結構。角色一致：brown topknot bun, cream shirt, moss-green overalls, red scarf, tan boots, seed pouch。切割後須符合 48x64 / anchor [0.5,0.86]。
globalConstraints: no text, letters, numbers, labels, logos, watermark, mockup border
consistent upper-left lighting, crisp readable pixel art
fully transparent background, no checkerboard pattern baked into the image
clean evenly-spaced grid, clear gaps between items, items never touch the cell edges

sheets.prompt: Pixel RPG walk spritesheet for farmer Miri Rowan. Four rows in order: walking DOWN facing viewer, walking LEFT profile, walking RIGHT profile, walking UP back view. Six frames per row: idle, step_a, passing_a, idle, step_b, passing_b. Clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG farming ACTION spritesheet for farmer Miri Rowan, same outfit, head size, full-body proportions and exact scale as the walk sheet. Twelve rows, six animation frames each. Group 1 WATERING with a watering can and small water arc: facing down, facing up (back), facing side. Group 2 HOEING the soil with a hoe and a small dirt puff: down, up, side. Group 3 SOWING seeds with a scatter of seeds: down, up, side. Group 4 HARVESTING pulling a crop up: down, up, side. Every frame shows the complete body from hair to both boots with 8-12% headroom; hoe_up must never be a portrait or half-body crop. Tools and effects stay secondary and inside each frame. Feet on one baseline, clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG ACTION spritesheet for farmer Miri Rowan, same outfit, head size, full-body proportions and exact scale as the walk sheet. Twelve rows, six frames each. Group 1 subtle IDLE breathing pose at walk-sheet scale: facing down, up, side. Group 2 COLLECTING picking up a basket of products: down, up, side. Group 3 BUILDING hammering with a mallet: down, up, side. Group 4 USING a station reaching out a hand to operate it: down, up, side. Every frame shows the complete body from hair to both boots with 8-12% headroom; idle is never a portrait, close-up, bust or giant head. Feet on one baseline, clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG walk spritesheet for a MALE farmer named Kai: short tidy brown hair (no bun), cream shirt, moss-green overalls, red neck scarf, tan boots, small seed pouch — same outfit, exact proportions and scale as the female farmer Miri walk sheet, just a young man. Four rows in order: walking DOWN facing viewer, walking LEFT profile, walking RIGHT profile, walking UP back view. Six frames per row: idle, step_a, passing_a, idle, step_b, passing_b. Clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG farming ACTION spritesheet for the MALE farmer Kai (short brown hair, cream shirt, moss-green overalls, red scarf, tan boots), same outfit, head size, full-body proportions and exact scale as his walk sheet. Twelve rows, six animation frames each. Group 1 WATERING with a watering can and small water arc: facing down, facing up (back), facing side. Group 2 HOEING the soil with a hoe and a small dirt puff: down, up, side. Group 3 SOWING seeds with a scatter of seeds: down, up, side. Group 4 HARVESTING pulling a crop up: down, up, side. Every frame shows the complete body from hair to both boots with 8-12% headroom; hoe_up and harvest_side must never be a portrait or half-body crop. Tools and effects stay secondary and inside each frame. Feet on one baseline, clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG ACTION spritesheet for the MALE farmer Kai (short brown hair, cream shirt, moss-green overalls, red scarf, tan boots), same outfit, head size, full-body proportions and exact scale as his walk sheet. Twelve rows, six frames each. Group 1 subtle IDLE breathing pose at walk-sheet scale: facing down, up, side. Group 2 COLLECTING picking up a basket of products: down, up, side. Group 3 BUILDING hammering with a mallet: down, up, side. Group 4 USING a station reaching out a hand to operate it: down, up, side. Every frame shows the complete body from hair to both boots with 8-12% headroom; idle is never a portrait, close-up, bust or giant head. Feet on one baseline, clean separated frames, transparent background, no scenery.

Pixel RPG townsfolk NPC spritesheet, original characters, all FRONT-FACING toward the viewer, same pixel art style, scale and proportions as the farmer character but clearly DIFFERENT distinct people (NOT the cream-shirt green-overalls farmer). Four rows, four columns. Columns left to right: idle_a standing, idle_b subtle breathing, talk_a mouth open with one hand raised gesturing, talk_b talking with the other hand gesturing. Row 1: a plump elderly TOWN MAYOR with a brown flat cap, bushy white mustache, green buttoned vest, tan trousers. Row 2: a friendly female MARKET MERCHANT with a headscarf, work apron, holding a small produce basket. Row 3: a weathered OLD FARMER with a wide straw hat, grey beard, blue denim overalls. Row 4: a small cheerful VILLAGE CHILD with a red cap and suspenders. Each character alone and centered in its cell with clear transparent padding so nothing touches the cell edges, feet on a common baseline, soft pixel shadow under the feet. No text, no labels, transparent background, no checkerboard pattern.

Pixel RPG farm animal care prop spritesheet, top-down slightly front-facing, transparent background. Four rows, four columns. Row 1 feed trough: empty wooden trough, trough with grain, trough with fresh hay, trough with mixed feed. Row 2 water trough: empty wooden water trough, half-full blue water, full clean blue water, sparkling fresh water. Row 3 grooming brush and care tools: simple wooden brush, brush with loose wool, small care bucket with brush, tidy care kit basket. Row 4 animal bedding: plain straw bed, fresh straw bed, cozy straw bed with small cloth, premium clean bedding with soft shine. Props only, absolutely no animals or people. Each object centered, readable at 64x64, consistent scale, soft pixel shadow, no text, no labels.

Pixel RPG farm product quality icon spritesheet, transparent background. Four rows: egg, milk bottle, wool bundle, honey jar. Three columns left to right: normal quality, good quality, premium quality. Normal quality should look plain and clean. Good quality should look fresher with a small subtle shine. Premium quality should look richer with golden sparkle accents, but no letters, no numbers, no labels, no star text. Icons only, centered in each cell, readable at 32x32, consistent outline thickness, upper-left lighting, no scenery.

Pixel RPG animal care VFX spritesheet, transparent background, six rows, six animation frames per row. Row 1 feed_bits: small grain and hay bits popping upward then fading. Row 2 water_splash: small blue water droplets splash and fade. Row 3 groom_sparkle: tiny clean dust puffs and soft white sparkles from brushing. Row 4 affinity_heart: small warm pink heart appears, rises, pulses, then fades. Row 5 quality_sparkle: golden sparkle burst for higher quality product, bright but not oversized. Row 6 care_ready_ring: soft circular ground ring pulse for a valid animal care target. Effects only, no animals, no people, no text, each frame centered with generous transparent padding.

Pixel RPG animal status icon spritesheet, transparent background. Four rows, four columns. Row 1 hungry icons: small feed bowl empty, feed bowl low, feed bowl request bubble, feed bowl urgent request. Row 2 thirsty icons: empty water drop, half water drop, water request bubble, urgent blue water request. Row 3 needs_groom icons: small brush, dusty brush, brush request bubble, urgent grooming request. Row 4 happy icons: small heart, two hearts, glowing heart, premium happy heart with tiny sparkle. Icons only, no text, no numbers, no animals, centered, readable at 32x32, consistent pixel outline.

Pixel RPG farm animal emotion and care spritesheet, cute side-on, same style and scale as the existing animals-32x32 sheet but output frames should fit 48x48. Four rows: brown hen chicken, black-and-white cow, fluffy white sheep, plump striped bee. Four columns: happy_a, happy_b, eating_a, eating_b. Happy frames should show a cheerful relaxed pose with subtle bounce. Eating frames should show the animal leaning toward feed or nibbling, but no separate large props. Each animal alone and centered with soft pixel shadow under feet, transparent background, no text, no labels, no people.

Separated top-down pixel RPG nature and structure props, ONLY the props, absolutely NO person, NO farmer, NO human character anywhere. Each prop is one object with a clear ground baseline and soft pixel shadow, GENEROUS spacing between objects so each one can be cleanly separated (avoid clustering two props close together). Include exactly ten props: a large round leafy oak tree, a tall pine tree, a small fruit tree, a big flowering bush, a wooden market stall with striped awning, a windmill, a wooden signpost, a hay bale, a flower bed, a lamp post. Objects are taller than one tile so they can occlude a character standing behind them. No text, no labels, transparent background.

Four separated large top-down pixel RPG farm buildings, ONLY the buildings, absolutely NO person, NO farmer, NO human character anywhere. Each building is big enough to cover a 2x2 or 3x2 tile footprint, one object with a flat ground baseline at its bottom edge and a soft pixel shadow, generous spacing, placed in a clean 2x2 layout. Include: top-left a cozy cottage farmhouse with red roof and chimney, top-right a big red barn with hayloft, bottom-left a wooden chicken coop with a fenced run and a couple of hens, bottom-right a small market shop stall with striped awning and produce crates. Front-facing slightly top-down so the roof and door read clearly. No text, no labels, transparent background, no checkerboard.

Pixel RPG crop GROWTH spritesheet. ONLY the crop plants, absolutely NO person, NO farmer, NO human character anywhere. Six rows: wheat, carrot, tomato, strawberry, corn, pumpkin. Five columns left to right: seed mound, sprout, young plant, mature plant, ready-to-harvest. Each crop grows from a stable bottom baseline, centered in its cell with clear transparent padding so nothing touches the cell edges, consistent scale within and across rows, ready stage clearly fuller than mature. No soil block behind the crop, transparent background, no text, no checkerboard.

Pixel RPG crop GROWTH spritesheet matching crops-48 quality. ONLY crop plants, no person or tools. Four rows: bell pepper, potato, purple grapes on a compact vine, green-striped melon vine. Five columns: detailed seed mound, sprout, young, mature, abundant ready-to-harvest. Use crisp dark pixel outlines, warm upper-left highlights, four to six shade ramps, organic leaf clusters, distinct crop silhouettes and a stable bottom baseline. Seed and sprout stages must be meaningful sprites, not colored blocks or sticks. Ready stages are visibly fuller than mature. Generous transparent padding, no touching cell edges, no text, no checkerboard.

Pixel RPG crop GROWTH spritesheet matching crops-48 and crops2-48 quality. ONLY crop plants, no person or tools. Three rows: pea, sweet potato, winter kale. Five columns: detailed seed mound, sprout, young, mature, abundant ready-to-harvest. Use crisp dark warm outlines, upper-left highlights, four to six shade ramps, organic leaf clusters, distinct crop silhouettes and a stable bottom baseline. Pea ready has clear plump pods, sweet potato ready has visible orange-purple tubers at the base, winter kale ready is a dense frosty blue-green rosette. Seed and sprout stages are meaningful sprites, never colored blocks or sticks. Ready stages are visibly fuller than mature. Generous transparent padding, no touching cell edges, no text, no checkerboard.

Pixel RPG crop GROWTH spritesheet matching crops-48 and crops2-48 quality. ONLY crop plants, no person or tools. Two rows: radish and sunflower. Five columns: detailed seed mound, sprout, young, mature, abundant ready-to-harvest. Use crisp dark warm outlines, upper-left highlights, four to six shade ramps, organic leaves, distinct silhouettes and a stable bottom baseline. Radish grows from a tiny red seed/root to a lush ready cluster with ruby-pink bulbs. Sunflower grows from a striped seed to a tall ready golden bloom with a dimensional seed center. Seed and sprout stages are meaningful sprites, never colored blocks or sticks. Ready stages are visibly fuller than mature. Generous transparent padding, no touching cell edges, no text, no checkerboard.

Polished pixel RPG golden farm duck spritesheet matching animals-48 in volume, outline weight, upper-left lighting, soft shade ramps and 48x48 scale. EXACTLY four columns by two rows. Top row: idle_a, idle_b, walk_a, walk_b. Bottom row: happy_a, happy_b, eating_a, eating_b. The two walk frames visibly alternate near and far webbed-foot positions and articulate the wing/body pose, never merely translate or bob one identical sprite. Happy frames use two distinct lifted-wing poses. Eating frames use two distinct head-down pecking poses. Same duck identity facing right in every cell, soft pixel ground shadow, generous transparent padding, no props, no text, no checkerboard.

Polished pixel RPG duck egg quality icon spritesheet matching animal-products-quality-32. Exactly three columns in one row: normal, good, premium. All use one broad pale blue-green duck egg silhouette, centered and consistent in scale. Normal has restrained slate outline and soft highlight; good has a richer turquoise rim plus a clear white-cyan shine; premium has an unmistakable warm gold outline, luminous highlight and several separated gold-white sparkles. Rounded three-dimensional volume, upper-left lighting, readable at 32x32, generous transparent padding, no labels, no letters, no numbers, no text, no checkerboard.

Pixel RPG farm animal spritesheet, cute side-on. ONLY the animals, absolutely NO person, NO farmer, NO human character in any cell. Four rows: a brown hen chicken, a black-and-white cow, a fluffy white sheep, a plump striped bee. Four columns: idle_a, idle_b (peck/chew), walk_a, walk_b. Each animal alone and centered in its cell with generous transparent padding so it never touches the cell edges, consistent scale per row, soft pixel shadow under the feet. Transparent background, no text, no checkerboard, no extra props.
